name: Grilled Rum-Soaked Shrimp with Mango Lime Rel
recipeInstructions:
------------
Fish (Grilled Rum-soaked Shrimp)
1. Peel the shrimp and make a 1/4-inch deep incision on each from tail to head.
2. Under cold, running water, open the incision and wash away any waste matter.
3. In a large stainless steel bowl, combine lime juice, pineapple juice, rum, crushed garlic, and salt and pepper to taste. Add shrimp. Cover and refrigerate for 2-4 hours (no longer).
4. Remove shrimp from marinade and discard liquid. Pierce each shrimp twice with a skewer.
5. Place the skewered shrimp on a grill over medium-high heat.
6. Grill for about 3-4 minutes per side until shells turn bright red and meat is opaque white.
7. Serve shrimp on a bed of Mango-Lime relish.
Note: The recipes are from Thrill of the Grill.
